svg.title: HomeOS hackathon architecture diagram
svg.desc: System architecture showing data flows between SF parcel data, Ghost, InsForge, WunderGraph, Redis, TinyFish, Nexla, and the Mapbox frontend

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the SF parcel open dataset')
sendPrompt('How is Ghost used as a synthetic DB in this project?')
sendPrompt('What does InsForge handle in this architecture?')
sendPrompt('What does TinyFish scrape and why?')
sendPrompt('How does WunderGraph federate the data sources?')
sendPrompt('What does Nexla Express do in this pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How does the AI agent orchestrate HomeOS logic?')
sendPrompt('How is Redis used for memory and caching?')
sendPrompt('What does the Mapbox frontend show in the demo?')
sendPrompt('How does Vapi fit into the demo?')
sendPrompt('When should we deploy to Akash?')
